# Copilot Documentation — forklift-safety-system

## How to use these docs

- **New to the project?** Start with [`AGENTS.md`](../../AGENTS.md) in the repo root.
- **Understanding the architecture?** Read [`docs/architecture/architecture.md`](../../docs/architecture/architecture.md).
- **Implementing a feature?** Use `/opsx-new` or see [`docs/development/implementing-new-feature.md`](../../docs/development/implementing-new-feature.md).
- **Code review?** Use `/opsx-review` or follow [`docs/development/code-review.md`](../../docs/development/code-review.md).
- **Setting up locally?** See [`docs/development/local-setup.md`](../../docs/development/local-setup.md).

## Key Documents

All documentation lives in [`docs/`](../../docs/). Per-file conventions live in [`docs/development/conventions/`](../../docs/development/conventions/).

## Slash Commands

See [`index.md`](./index.md) for the full command list.
